title: Reconstruction of motor control circuits in adult Drosophila using automated transmission electron microscopy
abstract: We introduce GridTape, an automated transmission electron microscopy platform for large-scale serial section imaging, and use it to reconstruct motor control circuits in the adult Drosophila ventral nerve cord, revealing principles of motor circuit organization.
notes: GridTape TEM technology enabled high-throughput serial section imaging. Published January 2021 in Cell.
